# JCode Harness Cloud

JCode Harness Cloud is a hosted remote MCP for OpenAI Codex harness MCP.

Website: https://jcodeharness.clauxel.com/
Docs pattern reference: https://github.com/clauxel/MiroFish
Primary keyword: OpenAI Codex harness MCP
Type: MCP
Default plan: team
MCP endpoint: https://jcodeharness.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://jcodeharness.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Registry name: com.clauxel.jcodeharness/jcodeharness-mcp
Tools: plan_coding_task, suggest_safe_command, record_test_verdict, read_run_history

Public boundary: docs-only repository; no production source code or secrets.
